articles.author: Chris McGraw
articles.title: The best 4th of July sales on tech to shop this weekend: Deals from Apple, Bose, Nintendo and more. - Yahoo Tech
articles.description: Pick up smartwatches, headphones, TVs and more on sale this weekend.
articles.content: Let's be honest: July 4th has never been the tech world's Black Friday, well, because that's Black Friday. It's a mattress and grill holiday, not a "score a new laptop" holiday and this year, with Ap… [+8680 chars]
